summary: Made two surgical seam edits: reinforced the print-chamber carryover at the chapter opening and tightened the final beat toward the too-near morning that opens Chapter 11.
edits: Added a print-chamber anchor in the opening paragraph to connect more cleanly to Chapter 9's handoff into the move.
Added a final sentence stressing the nearness of morning to sharpen the transition into Chapter 11's morning-after opening.
